title: Updating Values in an Array Using Indexing

content.problemStatement:
In this example, we demonstrate how to modify specific elements in an array using their index positions in C.
We first declare and initialize an integer array with 5 values. Then, we update two of the values using their indexes and display both the original and updated arrays.

**When executed, the code will show:**
```default
Original array: 10 20 30 40 50
Updated array:  10 25 30 45 50
```
